title: conradina grandiflora var. grandiflora
intro: Conradina grandiflora var. grandiflora, also known as the rosemary scrub or rosemary dune, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the coastal regions of the southeastern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Conradina grandiflora var. grandiflora include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cognitive function, and support respiratory health. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal applications, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human use.
